title: 'Umar b. 'Abd al-'Aziz Appoints 'Abd al-Rahman b. Nu'aym and 'Abd al-Rahman b. 'Abdallah al-Qushayri over Khurasan
description: Nu'aym and `Abd al-Rahman b. 'Abdalldh alQushayri over Khurdsan The reason for this, according to what was reported to me: alJarrah b. 'Abdalldh was dismissed from his position in Khurdsan at the time that the complaint was lodged against him. He was summoned by 'Umar b. 'Abd al-'Aziz and went to see him, as I have already reported above.305 According to'Ali b. Muhammad-Kharijah b. Mu^'ab al-I)abb'i and'Abdalldhb.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
